name: EGB OE TL.Z./GEA GROUP
summary: GEA Group AG is a German engineering company headquartered in Düsseldorf, providing equipment and process solutions for a range of industries, including food and beverage, dairy farming, chemical, pharmaceutical and energy. The company designs, manufactures, and services a wide range of equipment, from individual components to complete processing lines and plants. GEA Group operates globally and focuses on sustainable and efficient solutions.
